body_txt: Subtitles are most commonly used to provide an accurate translation of foreign speech, or to assist viewers with hearing difficulties. That is not their only use, however. In a silly enough work, they may well be used for jokes, parodying the content, or various other silliness. These jokes can even extend so far as to Break The Fourth Wall . Supertrope of Even the Subtitler Is Stumped . Also see Spice Up the Subtitles . A Trolling Translator may be involved, often resulting in a Gag Sub .
